content_blocks.text:
Jupiter and Venus - respectively produce effect when
they are in the beginning, the end and the middle of a
sign. Mercury produces effect at all times

दिनकररुधिरौ प्रवेशकाले गुरुभृगुजौ भवन्त्य मध्ययासौ ।
रषिसुसशशिनौ विनिर्गमस्वौ शशितमयः फकदस्तु सर्वकाकम् ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
दिनकररुधिरौ प्रवेशकाले गुरुभृगुजौ भवन्त्य मध्ययासौ ।
रषिसुसशशिनौ विनिर्गमस्वौ शशितमयः फकदस्तु सर्वकाकम् ॥

content_blocks.text:
आदी फलप्रदो भौमरवी मध्ये सितार्यकौ ।
सर्वदा शः शशीमन्दस्त्यवसाने फलप्रदरौ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आदी फलप्रदो भौमरवी मध्ये सितार्यकौ ।
सर्वदा शः शशीमन्दस्त्यवसाने फलप्रदरौ ॥

content_blocks.text:
यज्ञातुकोपजनिता खिलरोगशान्स्यै
तनाथमाशु जपतर्ण्यणहोमदानैः ।
संपूज्य रोगभयशोकविमुक्तचित्ताः
सर्वे नराः सुखयशोबलशालिनः स्युः ॥ ८३ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
यज्ञातुकोपजनिता खिलरोगशान्स्यै
तनाथमाशु जपतर्ण्यणहोमदानैः ।
संपूज्य रोगभयशोकविमुक्तचित्ताः
सर्वे नराः सुखयशोबलशालिनः स्युः ॥ ८३ ॥

content_blocks.text:
Whenever diseases are caused by irri-
tation of particular constituents of the body, people
should, in view to allay all such diseases, propitiate the
lord of the irritated constituents in question, by means
of prayers, libations of water, oblations (thrown in the
fire) and by liberal gifts. When their minds are by
these means freed from apprehensions of disease and
sorrow, they will become possessed of health, happiness
fame and strength.

verse_data.translation:
Whenever diseases are caused by irri-
tation of particular constituents of the body, people
should, in view to allay all such diseases, propitiate the
lord of the irritated constituents in question, by means
of prayers, libations of water, oblations (thrown in the
fire) and by liberal gifts. When their minds are by
these means freed from apprehensions of disease and
sorrow, they will become possessed of health, happiness
fame and strength.

content_blocks.text:
बालः कुमारोऽथ युवा च वृद्धो मृत्तथ राशावयुजि क्रमेण ।
त्रिंशक्लवैर्व्यस्ययतः समे स्युः एकैकशोशाः पुनरेव कार्यीः ॥ ८४ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
बालः कुमारोऽथ युवा च वृद्धो मृत्तथ राशावयुजि क्रमेण ।
त्रिंशक्लवैर्व्यस्ययतः समे स्युः एकैकशोशाः पुनरेव कार्यीः ॥ ८४ ॥

content_blocks.text:
In an odd sign, according to the num-
ber of degrees advanced, a planet is said to be in infancy,
in boyhood, in adolescence, in advanced age and in
extremis. But in an even sign, these several divisions
have to be again made regularly in the reverse order.

verse_data.translation:
In an odd sign, according to the num-
ber of degrees advanced, a planet is said to be in infancy,
in boyhood, in adolescence, in advanced age and in
extremis. But in an even sign, these several divisions
have to be again made regularly in the reverse order.

सिद्धान्तसारः
Jupiter and Venus - respectively produce effect when
they are in the beginning, the end and the middle of a
sign. Mercury produces effect at all times
०१. दृरस्वातक
दिनकररुधिरौ प्रवेशकाले गुरुभृगुजौ भवन्त्य मध्ययासौ ।
रषिसुसशशिनौ विनिर्गमस्वौ शशितमयः फकदस्तु सर्वकाकम् ॥

आदी फलप्रदो भौमरवी मध्ये सितार्यकौ ।
सर्वदा शः शशीमन्दस्त्यवसाने फलप्रदरौ ॥
यज्ञातुकोपजनिता खिलरोगशान्स्यै
तनाथमाशु जपतर्ण्यणहोमदानैः ।
संपूज्य रोगभयशोकविमुक्तचित्ताः
सर्वे नराः सुखयशोबलशालिनः स्युः ॥ ८३ ॥
Sloka. 83. Whenever diseases are caused by irri-
tation of particular constituents of the body, people
should, in view to allay all such diseases, propitiate the
lord of the irritated constituents in question, by means
of prayers, libations of water, oblations (thrown in the
fire) and by liberal gifts. When their minds are by
these means freed from apprehensions of disease and
sorrow, they will become possessed of health, happiness
fame and strength.
बालः कुमारोऽथ युवा च वृद्धो मृत्तथ राशावयुजि क्रमेण ।
त्रिंशक्लवैर्व्यस्ययतः समे स्युः एकैकशोशाः पुनरेव कार्यीः ॥ ८४ ॥
Sloka. 84. In an odd sign, according to the num-
ber of degrees advanced, a planet is said to be in infancy,
in boyhood, in adolescence, in advanced age and in
extremis. But in an even sign, these several divisions
have to be again made regularly in the reverse order.
